column9: Columbia Tomalock handle adapter — connects the Columbia One Handle system to Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. All-metal construction, quick-release angle adjustment.
column10: The Columbia Tomalock is a handle adapter used with the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. With no plastic pieces, the Tomalock does not snap under pressure or the weight of larger blades, increasing stability. The quick-release allows easy angle-of-attack adjustment. Compatible with the Columbia One Handle system. Billet machined in Canada.

column9: Columbia Phantom DDM dustless sander. All billet aluminum head, 99% dust collection, works with any vacuum with 1.5″ inlet. Includes 30 ft hose and extendible (26″–46″) pole.
column10: The Columbia Phantom DDM Sander incorporates all of the industry's preferred functionality in a beautifully machined billet aluminum body. This commercial-grade dustless sander works with any vacuum with a 1.5″ inlet and collects 99% of dust. The Phantom comes with the all-billet aluminum sanding head, 30 ft hose, and an extendible (26″ to 46″) pole. Handle adaptor rotates 360°. Billet machined in Canada.
